$comment: Gemini CLI hook config. Commands are wrapped in `bash -c` with a GEMINI_PROJECT_DIR -> CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR -> $PWD fallback, mirroring the .codex/hooks.json pattern, because some Gemini launchers don't propagate GEMINI_PROJECT_DIR to hook subprocesses. The hook records every match but injects context only for explicit, non-advisory decisions so routine tool calls stay fast.
